calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-07-2024 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-05-2024 Continued To Mar-06-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entry Of Entry Of Default Court Judgment Against Defendants Ea Grocers Inc And Elvis Ankeney
Off Calendar Jan-19-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Maria Evangelista; Clerk N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:30 am and concluding at 9:47 am.

Plaintiff 795 Pine I1, LLC. is present represented by Ian Browning, Esq. via zoom video conference.
Defendant EA Grocers Inc. is not present.

Plaintiff presents summary of facts, claims and an offer of proof.

RICHARD BRAVIN is sworn to testify on behalf of Plaintiff and testifies.
MARIA KADDOURA is sworn to testify on behalf of Plaintiff and testifies.

The matter is submitted.

By the statements made by Plaintiff and its counsel, documents filed, and evidence presented, the Court finds that Plaintiff has provided sufficient evidence proving each element of the complaint.

Good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff 795 Pine I1, LLC. and against Defendant EA Grocers Inc. as follows:

1. Damages: $309,996.62
2. Prejudgment Interest: $10,291.88
3. Costs: $533.04
4. Attorney fees: $14,688.00

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $335,509.54

Proposed judgment signed and filed. (D505)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-06-2023 Continued To Jan-31-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
